nodes.name: 栗腹皇鸠
nodes.summary: 栗腹皇鸠（Chestnut-bellied imperial pigeon，学名 Ducula brenchleyi），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, predominantly at elevations of 200-700 meters—though is now confined to higher elevations in many regions due to deforestation.{{Citation |last1=Baptista |first1=Luis F

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |last5=Garcia |first5=Ernest|editor-first1=Josep |editor-first2=Andrew |editor-first3=Jordi |editor-first4=David |editor-first5=Eduardo |editor-last1=Del Hoyo |editor-last2=Elliott |editor-last3=Sargatal |editor-last4=Christie |editor-last5=De Juana |doi=10.2173/bow.cbipig1.01 }} It is threatened by habitat loss
